briefdescription.para: This file contains declarations of the DFU specific functions and structures to be used in USB boot mode.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 bsv 02/10/2019 First release bsv 04/09/2020 Code clean up 1.01 bsv 07/08/2020 Moved Ch9Handler APIs from xloader_usb.c td 08/19/2020 Fixed MISRA C violations Rule 10.3 1.02 bsv 08/31/2021 Code clean up 2.4 aa 04/01/2026 Added macro for USB DFU status aa 04/10/2026 Renamed DFU macro
